heading: Climate change mitigation and greenhouse gas accounting
label: 262m–8 Climate change mitigation and greenhouse gas accounting
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 1307 and is classified to .section 1308 of Pub. L. 95–118section 262m–7 of this title

children.heading: Use of greenhouse gas accounting
children.label: a Use of greenhouse gas accounting
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury shall seek to ensure that multilateral development banks (as defined in ) adopt and implement greenhouse gas accounting in analyzing the benefits and costs of individual projects (excluding those with de minimus greenhouse gas emissions) for which funding is sought from the bank.section 262r(c)(4) of this title

children.heading: Expansion of climate change mitigation activities
children.label: b Expansion of climate change mitigation activities

children.text: significantly expanding support for investments in energy efficiency and renewable energy, including zero carbon technologies;
reviewing all proposed infrastructure investments to ensure that all opportunities for integrating energy efficiency measures have been considered;

children.label: A
children.text: analysis and policy measures needed for low carbon emission economic development; and

children.label: B
children.text: reforms needed to promote private sector investments in energy efficiency and renewable energy, including zero carbon technologies; and
integrate low carbon emission economic development objectives into multilateral development bank country strategies.

children.heading: Report to Congress
children.label: c Report to Congress
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , and annually thereafter, the Secretary of the Treasury shall submit a report on the status of efforts to implement this section to the Committee on Foreign Relations and the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate and the Committee on Financial Services and the Committee on Appropriations of the House of Representatives.June 24, 2009
